message:
fix(web): revert Zod validators, fix query persistence, and wire toggleService

create-vps/page.tsx:
- Revert from Zod schema validators back to inline validator functions
  (zodValidator adapter caused issues with TanStack Form v5 types)
- Remove zodValidator() and z imports

query-provider.tsx:
- Exclude ALL userPreferences queries from query-sync-storage persistence
  (each preference already has its own canonical localStorage key — double-
  persisting caused stale flashes on page reload)
- Remove specific detectedOS exclusion in favor of blanket "userPreferences"
  prefix check
- Remove unused userPreferencesKeys import

accounts/page.tsx:
- Wire toggleService directly from useCheckedServices hook instead of
  through handleToggle wrapper

userPreferences.ts:
- Simplify invalidateQueries call: pass queryKey directly instead of
  spreading into a new array (readonly arrays are accepted)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
